project_context.name: Sui Move Vulnerability Scanner
project_context.mission: Audit Sui Move smart contract source code for reentrancy, integer overflows, and privilege escalation vulnerabilities.
project_context.vision: Become the gold-standard security co-pilot for Move language developers.
project_context.problem_statement: Manual code reviews of smart contracts are slow and prone to human oversight.

semantic.fact: Reentrancy is generally prevented in Move by its strict resource borrow checker, but logical reentrancy remains possible in custom storage layouts.
